properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Amazing grace! what a sweet sound, Which Saved a vile man like me! I was lost, I am found, Blind, now I see.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This grace has taught me fear, And she took away my fears; How precious this grace seemed The moment I believed!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In dangers, sorrows and snares, What I have been through; This grace that kept me safe and sound Will lead me to Heaven.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Lord has promised me good, His Word sustains me, He will be my Shelter, my Part As long as I have life.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: After ten thousand years spent there, Shining like the sun, We will have more time than before To praise our God.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When this robe of flesh falls, My mortal life will cease; I will possess in the hereafter A life of joy and peace.
